error.msg: Include file: <iostream> not found. Please note: Standard library headers do not need to be provided to get proper results.
error.verbose: Include file: <iostream> not found. Please note: Standard library headers do not need to be provided to get proper results.

error.msg: Include file: <cstring> not found. Please note: Standard library headers do not need to be provided to get proper results.
error.verbose: Include file: <cstring> not found. Please note: Standard library headers do not need to be provided to get proper results.

error.msg: Include file: <cstdlib> not found. Please note: Standard library headers do not need to be provided to get proper results.
error.verbose: Include file: <cstdlib> not found. Please note: Standard library headers do not need to be provided to get proper results.

error.msg: Buffer is accessed out of bounds: dest
error.verbose: Buffer is accessed out of bounds: dest

error.msg: Obsolete function 'gets' called. It is recommended to use 'fgets' or 'gets_s' instead.
error.verbose: The obsolete function 'gets' is called. With 'gets' you'll get a buffer overrun if the input data exceeds the size of the buffer. It is recommended to use the functions 'fgets' or 'gets_s' instead.

error.msg: If memory allocation fails, then there is a possible null pointer dereference: ptr
error.verbose: If memory allocation fails, then there is a possible null pointer dereference: ptr

C-style pointer casting detected. C++ offers four different kinds of casts as replacements: static_cast, const_cast, dynamic_cast and reinterpret_cast. A C-style cast could evaluate to any of those automatically, thus it is considered safer if the programmer explicitly states which kind of cast is expected.

C-style pointer casting detected. C++ offers four different kinds of casts as replacements: static_cast, const_cast, dynamic_cast and reinterpret_cast. A C-style cast could evaluate to any of those automatically, thus it is considered safer if the programmer explicitly states which kind of cast is expected.

error.msg: Variable 'src' can be declared as pointer to const
error.verbose: Variable 'src' can be declared as pointer to const

location.info: Variable 'src' can be declared as pointer to const

error.msg: Parameter 'input' can be declared as pointer to const
error.verbose: Parameter 'input' can be declared as pointer to const

location.info: Parameter 'input' can be declared as pointer to const
